manual_topic_candidates.title: AI Agent hiring rebound becomes a business story
manual_topic_candidates.summary: Multiple sources debate whether AI Agent hiring is a real rebound or another short-lived wave.

source_items.summary: 36kr reports selected AI Agent startups are hiring again across engineering and delivery roles.
Zhihu users debate whether the rebound reflects durable demand or another narrative spike.
Overseas reporting says the scarce resource is no longer hype, but engineers who can ship real agent outcomes.

manual_topic_candidates.title: Celebrity airport outfit becomes the top hot search
manual_topic_candidates.summary: A pure entertainment topic with high traffic but weak business depth.

source_items.summary: Mostly image-led discussion with little lasting business value.
